title: The 7 Habits of Highly Effective People
author: Stephen R. Covey
core_idea: The 7 Habits summary — the actual 7 habits and what they mean.
bullets: Be proactive — focus on your circle of influence, not your circle of concern. You choose your response.
Begin with the end in mind — define what success actually looks like before you start (write a personal mission statement).
Put first things first — prioritize important-but-not-urgent work (Quadrant II) over urgent noise.
Think win-win — seek mutual benefit, not zero-sum.
Seek first to understand, then to be understood — listen with intent to understand, not to reply.
honest_take: Distilled from the top 2 Reddit threads. Enable an Anthropic API key for a synthesized, opinionated take.

quotes.text: Habit 5 (understand before being understood) is worth the whole book. Most conflict dies right there.
quotes.author: a commenter
